title: Player Capes
description: A beautiful client-side Fabric mod to wear any premium player's cape or elytra with an interactive 3D preview GUI!
body:
# 🌟 Player Capes

Have you ever wanted to wear your favorite Minecraft player's cape, or preview how an Elytra looks on your skin before buying or earning it? **Player Capes** is a premium, client-side cosmetic mod that lets you customize your cape and elytra textures in real-time using a beautiful, interactive 3D GUI!

---

## ✨ Features

* **🎭 Premium Cape Redirection**: Apply any premium Minecraft player's cape (e.g., Mojang, Minecon, OptiFine) to your character instantly just by typing their username!
* **📦 Local Custom Capes**: Load any local custom `.png` cape file directly from your computer using a LWJGL-native file picker!
* **🧍 Interactive 3D Preview Pane**: Features a 360-degree continuously rotating 3D preview of your player skin!
  * **Drag-to-Rotate**: Click and drag your character horizontally to rotate them and inspect your cape from any angle. Releasing the mouse smoothly resumes the automatic rotation!
  * **Upright Head Alignment**: The preview model's head remains completely straight and forward-facing, unaffected by where your in-game player is looking.
  * **Nametag Hidden**: The floating nametag above the character is completely hidden for a clean, professional outline preview!
* **⚡ Instant Elytra/Cape Toggle**: Seamlessly swap between a flat cape and a full 3D Elytra in the preview. 
  * In **Cape Mode**, standard chestplates (Netherite, Diamond, etc.) you are wearing in-game are preserved and rendered beneath the cape!
* **⭐ Favorites Naming Modal**: Save your favorite capes to a local favorites list. When saving, a beautiful naming dialog prompts you for a custom name, keeping your main control panel clean and uncluttered.
* **🟢 Active Highlight**: Applied favorites instantly light up in vibrant green in your sidebar list so you always know which custom look is active.
* **🚀 Native Drag-and-Drop / File Pickers**: A robust dual file-picking system that seamlessly falls back to LWJGL text fields to ensure file picking works on all platforms and launchers.

---

## 🛠️ How to Use

Simply launch the game and open the configuration screen:

* **Open the GUI**: Use the client command `/pcapes` (or `/pcapes info`) to open the customized tri-pane configuration screen.
* **Add a Cape**: Type a premium player's username in the text field and click **Apply Cape**!
* **Save to Favorites**: Click **Save to Favs**, type a custom name in the dialog popup, and hit Enter.
* **Reset**: Click **Reset Original** (or run `/pcapes reset`) to return to your default in-game look.

---

## 💻 Commands

* `/pcapes <premium_username>` - Instantly sets your cape to that player's cape.
* `/pcapes favourite` - Saves the current cape to your favorites.
* `/pcapes reset` - Resets your cape back to your default skin look.
* `/pcapes info` - Opens the interactive split-pane 3D Preview GUI.
